title: Storm&Lighthouse Gold Holographic Christmas Foil Stickers - 180 Assorted Round Stickers for Arts & Crafts, Christmas Cards Making
features: Single pack of Round Holographic Christmas Stickers.
The foil Christmas stickers are great for Christmas card making, sealing Christmas bags, adding a touch of sparkle to your wrapping paper, and arts and crafts activities in school and at home.
There are 6 different sticker designs and 18 stickers per sheet.
10 sheets per pack – 180 gold and black stickers in total.
Size: individual stickers measure approx. 2.5cm in diameter.
description: Seasons Greetings! These foil stickers in assorted designs are a great addition to any Christmas arts and crafts activities. The shiny gold "Merry Christmas" text with gold detail on the black backdrop will add that touch of sparkle to your presents, cards, envelopes and labels. For kids and adults, everyone will enjoy using these large label stickers or seeing them on their cards and gifts. Use these holographic stickers to make your own Christmas cards, decorations and gift labels - have a festive holiday with these gold foil stickers! These are a perfect addition to any seasonal craft box! The self adhesive black and gold stickers are a fun add-on to your Christmas card making supplies, and Christmas presents. Each sparkly Christmas sticker pack contains 10 sheets of assorted Christmas stickers. There are 18 stickers per sheet with 6 assorted designs (30 of each). Individual stickers measure 2.5cm in diameter. Recommended for children aged 3+.
